chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Rev. Application No.S-11 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.08.2019. None present for the applicant. Mr. Shewak Rathore, D.P.G for the State. = The facts leading to passing of instant order are that the private respondent on due trial was convicted by learned Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate-I, Tando Adam for an offence punishable under section 298-A, PPC and was sentenced to undergo rigorous imprisonment for three years and to pay fine of Rs.10,000/- and in case of his failure to pay such fine, to undergo simple imprisonment for two months vide his judgment dated 01.12.2014. On appeal, so preferred by the private respondent, he was acquitted by learned Ist. Additional Sessions Judge, Tando Adam vide his judgment dated 13.12.2016. The acquittal of the private respondent by learned Ist. Additional Sessions Judge, Tando Adam was impugned by the applicant before this court by way of instant criminal revision application. Its` maintainability is also under cloud, as acquittal of any person could only be impugned by way of preferring an acquittal appeal. Be that as it may, none has appeared on behalf of the applicant and no intimation is furnished, which has left no alternate for this court but to dismiss the instant criminal application for non-prosecution. JUDGE g
